name: creativity-inc
description: Ed Catmull's Creativity, Inc. — toolkit for building and sustaining a creative culture by removing the unseen forces that kill originality
useCase: Build and protect a creative culture using Pixar's Braintrust model, Ugly Baby protection, and Beast-taming techniques
knownRisks: Braintrust model requires genuine peer dynamics — a hierarchical org cannot fake this
The 'fail fast' ethos can be misused as an excuse for sloppy execution
Cultural change takes years, not weeks — expectations must be managed
